heading: Configure dateFacet Field Properties
body:
The MongoDB Search `dateFacet` type takes the following parameter:

| UI Field Name | JSON Option | Type   | Necessity | Description                                                                    |
| ------------- | ----------- | ------ | --------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Data Type     | type        | string | required  | Human-readable label that identifies this field type. Value must be dateFacet. |
